title: Autosmelt
description: This quality of life datapack is a simple autosmelt (as in the ones in UHC).
body:
This quality of life datapack is a simple autosmelt (as in the ones in UHC) so your raw ores like iron will automatically be converted into iron ingots.



Feel free to add suggestions for more datapacks, features or updates I should make as I am new on the platform!



- Dank__Memer
